pi_items.source: task setup clears this file, task description and verifier require it
setup_task.sh XML generation for frontend_phase.xml includes <Name>Login UI Component</Name>
setup_task.sh XML generation for backend_phase.xml includes <Name>Auth API Endpoint</Name>
setup_task.sh XML generation for frontend_phase.xml includes <Name>UI Designer</Name> in Resources
setup_task.sh XML generation for backend_phase.xml includes <Name>Backend Dev</Name> in Resources

privileged_info_summary: The environment synthetically generates two project XML files: frontend_phase.xml and backend_phase.xml in /home/ga/Projects/phases/. The frontend file contains a task 'Login UI Component' and a resource 'UI Designer'. The backend file contains a task 'Auth API Endpoint' and a resource 'Backend Dev'. The task requires merging them into /home/ga/Projects/output/full_release.xml.
